name: Bad Cop [Entropy Zero 2]
description:
Art done by das-sena on Tumblr

TW: (Violence, cussing).

(Rebel POV)

- 3650, also known as "Bad Cop" was a devoted follower of The Combine, an alien race who took over Earth.

He was an enforcer for The Combine, or atleast that was until he had to face them in order to keep his memories and faculties. -

In this scenario you are a rebel defending from the Arbeit Communications siege.

Also, he hasn't met Wilson yet.

If i see y'all like this then i'll make a Combine POV version
creator: M134
